tasks.name: Create CourseProgressWidgetData type
tasks.purpose: Define the data contract for the course progress widget, including completion percentage, lesson counts, and current lesson ID

constraints: Must be nullable to handle empty state

tasks.input_state: Dashboard types file may not exist yet (created in S1823.I1.F1)
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressWidgetData interface exported from dashboard.types.ts with fields: completionPercentage, completedLessons, totalLessons, currentLessonId (all nullable)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: TypeScript interface exists and compiles without errors

tasks.name: Create course progress loader function
tasks.purpose: Fetch course progress data from course_progress and lesson_progress tables with RLS enforcement

constraints: Must use RLS-enforced client (not admin client)
Must use cache() wrapper for per-request memoization
Must handle case where user has no course progress

tasks.output_state: loadCourseProgress function exported from course-progress.loader.ts, queries course_progress table, returns CourseProgressWidgetData or null
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function compiles, fetches data with RLS, returns null for users without course enrollment

tasks.name: Create CourseProgressWidgetSkeleton component
tasks.purpose: Provide a loading state UI using Skeleton component that matches the populated widget layout
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressWidgetSkeleton component exported, renders Card with Skeleton placeholders for radial chart and text
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Skeleton component exists and matches widget layout dimensions

tasks.name: Create CourseProgressWidget populated state
tasks.purpose: Display course progress using RadialProgress component wrapped in Card with lesson count text and Continue Course button

constraints: Must import RadialProgress from existing location
Must be server component except RadialProgress client component
Must show lesson count text below radial chart

tasks.input_state: Loader function exists and returns CourseProgressWidgetData
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressWidget component displays radial progress, lesson count (e.g., '17 of 23 lessons'), and Continue Course button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget renders with real data, RadialProgress displays percentage, button navigates correctly
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm dev # Manual: Navigate to /home, verify radial chart and button render

tasks.name: Add empty state to CourseProgressWidget

action.target: empty state UI for no course progress

tasks.purpose: Display friendly message and enrollment CTA when user has no course progress data

constraints: Must check if data is null before rendering

tasks.output_state: Widget shows empty state Card with message 'Start your learning journey' and 'Browse Course' button when data is null
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders when loader returns null, button links correctly
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck # Manual: Test with user account that has no course_progress record

tasks.name: Wire CourseProgressWidget to dashboard loader

action.target: widget to dashboard page with Suspense

tasks.purpose: Integrate widget into dashboard.loader.ts parallel fetching and add to dashboard page with loading boundary

constraints: Must add loadCourseProgress to Promise.all in dashboard loader
Must wrap widget in Suspense boundary with skeleton fallback
Widget must be positioned in top-left grid cell (row 1, col 1)

tasks.input_state: Widget component complete with all states, loader function exists, dashboard loader infrastructure exists (from S1823.I1.F1)
tasks.output_state: Dashboard loader includes courseProgress in parallel fetch, page.tsx renders widget in grid with Suspense boundary
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget appears on /home dashboard in correct grid position, loading skeleton shows during fetch, data displays correctly
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm dev # Navigate to /home, verify widget renders in top-left position
